calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Receipt(S) For Blocked Account For The Minor Jazzmene Taber.
Off Calendar Jan-02-2007 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milton Weiss (Counsel for the Estate's Administrator, Jo'Nay Brunson).

Discussion was had with respect to a preliminary distribution made by the Administrator to herself without Court authorization. The Court allowed, but did not approve, the preliminary distribution but surcharged Ms. Brunson the amount of $1,065.00 for interest which would have otherwise been earned on the distribution. The Court further revised the sums for final distribution allowing $49,798.61 to Jo'Nay Brunson and $80,330.77 to Jazzmene Taber (a minor), the latter distribution which must be placed in a blocked bank account until the minor reaches the age of majority. Receipts for said blocked account must be filed with the Court on or before January 2, 2007. Mr. Weiss is to prepare the Order.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
